page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package implements the cn.FARMS algorithm for copy number variation (CNV) analysis. It allows to analyze the most common Affymetrix (250K-SNP6.0) array types, supporting high-performance computing using snow and ff.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package implements the cn.FARMS algorithm for copy number variation (CNV) analysis. It allows to analyze the most common Affymetrix (250K-SNP6.0) array types, supporting high-performance computing using snow and ff.
